name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Mutual NDA, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys. Covers mutual confidentiality obligations between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA. Fill in bracketed terms and sign with counterparty; incorporates the Standard Terms by reference.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA). Governs the provision of cloud-hosted software services between a vendor and a customer.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement. Structures early-stage product collaboration between a software vendor and a design partner customer.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement (SLA). Defines uptime commitments, incident response targets, and remedies for cloud service providers.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement (PSA). Covers the delivery of consulting or implementation services, including statements of work.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement (DPA). Addresses GDPR and CCPA obligations when a vendor processes personal data on behalf of a customer.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement. Governs on-premise or downloadable software licensing, including support and maintenance terms.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement. Establishes the terms of a reseller or referral partnership between two companies.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement. Governs a time-limited, often free or reduced-cost trial of a software product prior to a full commercial agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA). Required under HIPAA when a vendor handles protected health information on behalf of a covered entity.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper Standard AI Addendum. Supplements an existing service agreement to address AI-specific terms such as data use, model training restrictions, and output ownership.
